message:
fix(parser): eliminate double-advance bug in DOT attribute extraction

The extract_dot_attribute_raw helper was calling chars.next().unwrap()
inside a peek loop, which both consumed the iterator AND pushed the
returned char -- but since peek() already provided the char, the next()
call was redundant and risked a panic on an exhausted iterator. Split
into push(c) + chars.next() for both key and value parsing branches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
